title: Dreaming of Pride: Ego and Honor
seoDescription: What does it mean to feel pride or see arrogance in a dream? Success, ego, honor, loneliness, and downfall.
introduction: Pride is the pinnacle of mountains. To feel pride in a success within a dream symbolizes **'Self-Respect and Achieving Goals'**. However, to be arrogant and belittle others is **'A Harbinger of Downfall'**. It is essential to distinguish between a dignified stance and empty arrogance.
symbolism:
Pride finds a deep and complex reflection within a person's inner world. The pride felt for a child symbolizes reaping the fruits of a brave step into the future and experiencing the joy of family. This pride offers the opportunity to savor life's most beautiful moments, much like a flower nurtured with love blooming.

Yet, pride has a dark side; arrogance can lead one into loneliness and cause the loss of friends. This solitude echoes like a resonance in the depths of the soul, confronting one with the fear of failure. The breaking of pride is an enlightenment that follows the shaking of the ego. This experience offers a chance to see the truths and reassess oneself. A broken pride actually opens a door to discovering the true meaning of life.
cosmicAnalysis:
This dream carries 4 different cosmic messages according to the phases of the Moon:

**🌑 New Moon:** Pride heralds renewal and beginnings. During the New Moon phase, you should focus on setting goals that will enhance your self-respect and nurturing your hopes for the future.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** In this phase, the pride you feel in your achievements can motivate you. However, it is crucial to avoid arrogance and belittling others for healthy growth and development.

**🌕 Full Moon:** The Full Moon symbolizes a period when pride and achievements reach their peak. In this phase, being aware of your accomplishments offers a chance to balance your ego and illuminate your inner truths.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** In this phase, it is time to let go of past feelings of arrogance and loneliness. The breaking of your pride can facilitate a deep transformation, helping you see the truths more clearly and reconcile with your self-respect.
commonScenarios: Being praised: Symbolizes appreciation and motivation.
Walking with one's nose in the air: Indicates disconnection from the public and unlikability.
Being proud and silent: Signifies stubbornness and communication breakdown.
